item.title: DOJ’s targeting of Trump critics ramps up with attempt to indict lawmakers
item.description: The effort to indict six Democratic lawmakers marks the first time DOJ has attempted to classify critical speech from prominent Trump detractors as a ...

item.title: Transfer of ISIS suspects nears end as Trump pursues Syria exit
item.description: The movement of between 6,000 and 7,000 detainees to Iraqi government control, underway for weeks, could be complete as soon as Friday.

item.title: White House fires U.S. attorney in N.Y. hours after judges appointed him
item.description: Donald T. Kinsella was chosen by judges to lead the federal prosecutors’ office in Albany, then fired hours later via an email from the White House.

item.title: Ocasio-Cortez, Rubio to offer dueling visions of world order in Munich
item.description: The potential 2028 presidential candidates will sound off on a range of burgeoning crises as European leaders recoil at America’s populist politics.

item.title: Partial government shutdown looms as Congress leaves town without a deal
item.description: Large swaths of the Department of Homeland Security are set to shut down Saturday unless lawmakers and the White House strike a last-minute deal.
